cases.case_ref: Income tax demand AY2018-19 to AY2021-22 and AY2023-24 to AY2024-25
cases.parties: Centum Electronics vs Income Tax Department
cases.note: Company believes the demand suffers from 'mistakes apparent from records' and is filing rectification applications/appeals; expects the demand to be substantially reduced. A separate appellate order already led to an expected Rs4.573cr reduction (disclosed ~17 Jan 2026).
